hooks.prompt:
CITATION FINAL CHECK — cited.md self-check rule. The assistant is about to stop. Context: $ARGUMENTS

Perform the cited.md self-check: 'After completing a set of changes, review your output. For every Edit/Write tool call, verify there is a What/Why/Source block preceding it AND a Result block following it. If any is missing, add it retroactively before moving on.'

If all edits appear properly cited (or no edits were made), return {"ok": true}.
If any edits are missing citations, return {"ok": false, "reason": "Self-check failed: one or more Edit/Write/Bash calls are missing What/Why/Source or Result citation blocks. Go back and add them before stopping."}.

CITATION CHECK FOR SUBAGENT — cited.md rule 10: 'Subagent results need citations.' The subagent is about to stop. Context: $ARGUMENTS

Verify the subagent cited all Edit/Write/Bash calls with What/Why/Source blocks, and that results passed to the main agent have source attribution (e.g. [source: path/to/file:L42 — found via exploration]).

If citations are missing, return {"ok": false, "reason": "Subagent must cite all changes with What/Why/Source blocks per cited.md rule 10."}.
Otherwise return {"ok": true}.

CITATION COMPLETION AUDIT — cited.md rules. A task has completed. Context: $ARGUMENTS

Final audit: did ALL Edit/Write/Bash tool calls during this task have What/Why/Source citation blocks before them AND Result blocks after them as required by cited.md? No orphan edits, no orphan suggestions.

If any are missing, return {"ok": false, "reason": "Task completed but citation audit failed. Missing What/Why/Source or Result blocks on one or more edits."}.
Otherwise return {"ok": true}.
